message:
feat(api): add triangular index generators, cumulative extrema, diff, count_nonzero, and repeat_interleave

New tensor operations in FrankenTorchSession:
- tril_indices / triu_indices: lower/upper triangular matrix index
  generators with configurable offset (PyTorch torch.tril_indices /
  torch.triu_indices equivalents)
- tensor_count_nonzero: count non-zero elements in a tensor
- tensor_diff: n-th discrete difference along the last dimension
- tensor_cummax / tensor_cummin: cumulative max/min returning both
  values and indices
- tensor_repeat_interleave: repeat each element of a 1-D tensor a
  given number of times

All operations include comprehensive unit tests covering basic usage,
edge cases, offsets, and identity behaviour. Test count updated from
2321 to 2336 in FEATURE_PARITY.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
